text: Design + write real landing content (hero, live outline demo island, install, agent story) #landing
Deploy landing to kalamu.dev (CF Pages or Vercel, root dir packages/landing) + DNS at registrar #landing

Whole-outline PUT (undo/clean) from a stale client strips fields its server's Zod schema doesn't know (default strip mode) - seen 2026-07-10: a pre-assignee tab's Clean up erased assignee fields. Consider passthrough on nodeSchema for PUT, or a version handshake that tells stale UIs to reload
